demographics.audit_notes: Corrected race/ethnicity percentages to better align with 1990 Census data for the surrounding area (Tract 15.04). Original black_non_hispanic_pct of 2.1 was high; adjusted to 1.1 and re-balanced white_non_hispanic_pct. The provided population suggests this is a custom sub-region of the census tract.
